title: Iran Update Special Report, March 29, 2026
takeaways_en: The Washington Post reported on March 29 that the combined force has struck four key Iranian ballistic missile production facilities and 29 missile launch bases since the start of the war. ISW-CTP has similarly recorded strikes on over 20 missile bases during the war.

Senior Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) officials continue to dismiss Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian's concerns about Iran's economic conditions amid Iran's war with the United States and Israel. Anti-regime media reported on March 28 that there is a deepening rift between Pezeshkian and IRGC Commander Brigadier General Ahmad Vahidi over the regime's actions during the war and the war's mounting economic and social costs, citing unspecified informed sources.

The Iranian regime appears to be appealing to nationalist sentiments to recruit members of the Iranian population to help the regime maintain internal security. The Wall Street Journal reported on March 29 that Iran has launched a recruitment campaign called 'Janfada,' or 'Sacrificing Life,' to recruit volunteers to fight US forces in the event of a US ground operation in Iran, citing a text message sent to Iranian mobile users.

Russia continues to help Iran conduct attacks across the Middle East. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said that Russia is providing Iran with satellite imagery of US military assets in the region. Zelensky said that Russia took satellite imagery of the US-UK base in Diego Garcia on March 24 as well as the Incirlik Airbase in Turkey, Al Udeid Airbase in Qatar, and the Shaybah oil and gas field in Saudi Arabia on March 26. Russian efforts to take images of these sites indicate that Russia is helping Iran attack not only US assets but also Turkish and British assets. Iran has attacked all of these sites since the war began.
takeaways_zh: 【导弹设施打击】《华盛顿邮报》3月29日报道，联合部队自战争开始以来已打击四个关键伊朗弹道导弹生产设施和29个导弹发射基地。ISW-CTP同样记录了战争期间对20多个导弹基地的打击。
【伊朗内部分歧】伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）高级官员继续无视伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬（Masoud Pezeshkian）对伊朗经济状况的担忧。反政权媒体3月28日报道称，佩泽希齐扬与IRGC总司令瓦希迪（Ahmad Vahidi）将军之间的裂痕正在加深，原因是对战争行动及战争造成的经济和社会成本的分歧。
【民族主义动员】伊朗政权似乎在诉诸民族主义情绪来招募伊朗民众帮助维持内部安全。《华尔街日报》3月29日报道，伊朗发起了一项名为'Janfada'（牺牲生命）的招募活动，招募志愿者在美国对伊朗发动地面行动时与美作战。
【俄罗斯支持】俄罗斯继续帮助伊朗在中东发动袭击。乌克兰总统泽连斯基表示，俄罗斯向伊朗提供美国军事资产的卫星图像，包括迪戈加西亚基地、土耳其因吉尔利克空军基地、卡塔尔乌代德空军基地和沙特谢巴油气田。俄罗斯拍摄这些地点图像的努力表明，俄罗斯正在帮助伊朗不仅袭击美国资产，还袭击土耳其和英国资产。
